overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a character walking through a foggy industrial harbor dock in the early 1900s. The character moves past workers loading cargo, through a covered wooden passage between warehouses, and emerges at a waterfront with docked steamships and sailing vessels.

tall brick chimneys emitting dark smoke into the foggy air
stacks of wooden shipping crates and boxes on the dock
wooden telegraph poles with crossbars and hanging lanterns

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy industrial dock with wooden plank flooring. The Saint Denis train station looms in the background while workers move about loading cargo. Smokestacks release plumes of smoke into the hazy morning air, and utility poles line the dock area.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial cargo area approaching covered warehouse passage

events.description: approaching the entrance to a covered wooden corridor between warehouse buildings

agents.ego_description: continuing through the dock area toward a covered passage, passing workers and cargo

entered.detail: large stacks of wooden barrels and metal drums
dark entrance to a covered wooden walkway between industrial buildings
industrial warehouse building with corrugated metal siding

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the industrial dock area, the camera passes stacks of barrels and approaches a dark covered passage between warehouses. The train station recedes behind as the character navigates through the cluttered cargo zone toward the enclosed walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden corridor between industrial warehouses

events.description: entering dark covered corridor, visibility decreases significantly as light fades

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit enclosed passage between warehouse buildings

notable_agents.action: worker walking toward the camera through the corridor

entered.detail: enclosed walkway with wooden plank walls and metal roofing
painted sign on warehouse wall reading KEEP OUT UNLESS AUTHORIZED

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow covered corridor between industrial buildings, where the lighting drops significantly creating a dim, enclosed atmosphere. Wooden walls and a metal roof surround the path, with a 'Keep Out' sign visible on the right wall as the character approaches the corridor exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront dock with moored steamships and harbor

events.description: exiting covered passage into open waterfront area with docked ships and harbor water visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront dock past moored vessels and cargo

notable_agents.action: worker carrying a crate toward a docked steamboat

entered.detail: large steam-powered vessel with tall smokestack and masts moored at the dock
calm water of the harbor with distant ships visible through the fog
tall brick warehouse building with KEEP OUT signage above green doors

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered passage, the scene opens to a waterfront dock with a large steamboat moored alongside. The harbor water stretches into the foggy distance, while workers continue loading cargo. A brick warehouse with 'Keep Out' signage stands on the right as the character walks toward the water's edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a hazy industrial dock that gradually narrows into a dark, enclosed warehouse passage. It begins on wooden plank flooring with the Saint Denis train station looming in the background as workers load cargo beneath plumes of smoke from distant smokestacks. As the camera moves deeper into the dock area, it glides past utility poles and stacks of barrels, causing the train station to recede into the fog. The scene then shifts from the open, cluttered cargo zone toward a shadowed architectural gap, finally entering a covered walkway between two warehouses.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, enclosed industrial corridor into the expansive, foggy openness of a waterfront dock. It begins as the character enters a narrow covered passage between buildings, where the lighting drops significantly and wooden walls create a claustrophobic atmosphere. As the character approaches the exit, passing a Keep Out sign on the right, the scene opens abruptly into the bright, misty air of the harbor. The view then expands to reveal a large steamboat moored alongside the dock and workers loading cargo, while the camera moves past a brick warehouse toward the water's edge.
